detailed_camera_plan: Follow Qin Ying as he exits the room and pauses at the threshold.
action_description: Qin Ying walks out of the bedroom and feels the scorching heat of the July air.
staging_description: Threshold between bedroom and exterior balcony/hallway.

character_poses.秦嬴: Stepping forward, squinting eyes against the heat, hand shielding brow.

ending_composition_description: Qin Ying standing at the doorway, looking back into the cool room.
